description: 5 email UX improvements: rename compose title, full-takeover when no connection, shared EmailConnectionPrompt, disable Rédiger button, global compose via sidebar + button

userStories.title: Rename compose modal title + disable Rédiger when no connection
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, the compose modal says 'Nouvel email' and the Rédiger button is disabled when I have no email connected
acceptanceCriteria: Compose modal title is 'Nouvel email' (not 'Nouveau message')
Rédiger button in mail page is disabled when emailConnections has no active connections
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Title changed in compose-email-modal.tsx:122. Rédiger disabled via emailConnections.filter(active).length === 0 in mail-client.tsx:878.

userStories.title: Extract shared EmailConnectionPrompt component
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a reusable EmailConnectionPrompt component that both the settings dialog and mail page can use without code duplication
acceptanceCriteria: New component at components/email/email-connection-prompt.tsx
Contains OAuth tabs + IMAP form (extracted from email-connection-form.tsx)
Settings page uses it inside Dialog with 'Ajouter une connexion email' title
email-connection-form.tsx becomes a thin re-export or is deleted
Existing settings page behavior unchanged
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Moved EmailConnectionForm → EmailConnectionPrompt at components/email/. Added className prop + cn(). Fixed any→unknown, removed console.error. Old file is thin re-export. Settings page updated to direct import.

userStories.title: Mail page full takeover when no email connected
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire with no email connected, I see the connection form directly on the mail page instead of empty folders
acceptanceCriteria: When emailConnections is empty, mail page shows centered EmailConnectionPrompt
Heading 'Connectez votre email' + subtitle displayed above the form
3-column layout (sidebar, list, detail) is NOT rendered
On successful connection, page refreshes to show full mail client
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Early return pattern in mail-client.tsx render. Centered EmailConnectionPrompt with Mail icon + heading + subtitle. router.refresh() on success. Dead disabled prop removed from Rédiger button.

userStories.title: Global ComposeEmailProvider + sidebar + button
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I can compose emails from anywhere via the sidebar + button, and the compose modal opens without page redirect
acceptanceCriteria: ComposeEmailProvider context at gestionnaire with-navbar layout level
Sidebar shows + button next to Emails when hasActiveConnections
Sidebar + button is hidden when no active connections
Clicking + opens compose modal from any page (no redirect)
Mail page Rédiger button uses context openCompose() instead of local state
Mail page no longer renders its own ComposeEmailModal instance
Layout fetches email connections SSR and passes to provider
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Created ComposeEmailProvider context with single modal instance at layout level. Layout fetches connections via parallel SSR query. Sidebar uses createAction + useComposeEmail hook for onClick-based + button. Mail page delegates compose to context, removed local ComposeEmailModal render and composeOpen state.
